statement: In every magma, Equation 1105 (`x = y * ((x * (z * w)) * y)`) implies Equation 940 (`x = y * ((y * z) * (w * z))`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0798
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op y (op (op x (op z w)) y))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op y (op (op y z) (op w z)))
